message:
✨ Improve EventsDrillDown with skeleton loading and error handling

- Add skeleton loader during fetch
- Show error state with retry button when fetch fails
- Add kubectl fallback command with copy button
- Better UX when no events found

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
